content:
# Backus Averaging

**Summary**: A method used to upscale well log data to seismic resolution by averaging over a window.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] applied backus-averaging to validate the consistency of the rock physics models at the seismic scale.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Upscaled well data showed good agreement with measured properties, confirming model validity at seismic resolution. ([[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021, p. 60]])
